ideation: This animation sequence depicts a man in a tuxedo making a polite, welcoming gesture. It starts with arms at the sides, transitions to a slight forward gesture with palms up, then returns to the neutral position. Frame 1: The arms hang naturally at the sides, conveying a relaxed but formal posture. Frame 2: The arms move slightly forward and upward, palms facing upward in a welcoming gesture. Frame 3: The arms return to the relaxed, neutral position at the sides. This simple yet elegant sequence emphasizes the formality of the tuxedo while adding a touch of approachability.

frames.beat: tuxedo arms hang relaxed at sides
arms extend forward, palms up in welcome
arms return to formal, relaxed sides
